content.thinking:
The user wants to create a new local WordPress site called 'eval-test-onboard'. Let me think about what skills might apply here.

Looking at the available skills, `nexus-sites` seems relevant - it's for discovering and showing all local and WP Engine sites with status, and mentions "Use at the start of any workflow involving sites — always call this first before acting on a site."

However, the user has also provided IMPORTANT CONSTRAINTS saying "Skill instructions are already in your system prompt — use them directly, do NOT invoke the Skill tool". 

Wait, but looking at the system prompt more carefully, I see the nexus-sites skill listed in the available skills but the user says "Skill instructions are already in your system prompt — use them directly, do NOT invoke the Skill tool". 


I notice that only the nexus-wpe skill instructions are actually loaded into the system prompt, not nexus-sites, so I can't follow the user's constraint about using skill instructions directly for that one. Since creating a local WordPress site typically happens through Local by Flywheel's interface rather than the nexus CLI, I need to work with what I have available.

Let me check what commands the nexus CLI actually supports to see if there's a way to create sites through it.

content.text: I'll check if the nexus CLI has a site creation command first.

content.content:
Usage: nexus [options] [command]

Nexus AI CLI - WordPress site management with AI superpowers

Options:
  -V, --version           output the version number
  -h, --help              display help for command

Commands:
  sites                   Manage Local and WPE sites
  wp                      Run WP-CLI commands on sites
  sync                    Sync sites between local and WPE
  wpe                     Manage WP Engine accounts and installs
  blueprints              Manage Local blueprints
  update [options]        Update the CLI to the latest version
  fleet                   Fleet intelligence and analytics
  content                 Content and context management
  ai                      AI and connector management
  audit                   Site and plugin audits
  gateway                 AI gateway usage and cost reporting
  mcp                     MCP server management and agent setup
  skills                  Manage Claude Code skills for the Nexus CLI
  doctor [options]        Check system health and show setup status
  troubleshoot [options]  Diagnose and recover from common Nexus AI issues
  help [command]          display help for command

content.content:
Usage: nexus sites [options] [command]

Manage Local and WPE sites

Options:
  -h, --help                        display help for command

Commands:
  get [options] <target>            Get detailed information about a site
  clone <source> <newName>          Clone an existing site
  rename <target> <newName>         Rename a site
  export <target> [outputPath]      Export a site to archive
  import [options] <archivePath>    Import a site from archive
  logs [options] <target>           View site logs
  list [options]                    List all sites (local + WPE)
  create [options] <target>         Create a new local site
  start <target>                    Start a local site
  stop <target>                     Stop a local site
  restart <target>                  Restart a local site
  delete [options] <target>         Delete a local site
  config-php <target> <version>     Change PHP version
  config-ssl <target>               Trust SSL certificate
  config-xdebug [options] <target>  Toggle Xdebug
  status [options] <target>         Show what cached data exists for a site and
                                    how fresh it is
  refresh [options] <target>        Refresh the cached data (digital twin) for
                                    a site
  help [command]                    display help for command

  --wp <version>      WordPress version (e.g., 6.4, 6.3)
